title: Better Maces
description: Makes Maces Look Less Like A Toy By Making It A 3D Hammer.
body:
Makes The Mace Look Less Like A Toy And More Like A Weapon By Making It A 3D Hammer.
It Is Perfect If You Want A 3D Mace That Isn't Just A **Cube On A Blue Stick**.
It Takes The Heavy Core, Attaches Some Rectangles To The Sides And Puts It On A **Blue Stick**.
